title: Marine strategy part three: 2025 UK programme of measures
body: " This strategy is an update to the Marine strategy part three: UK programme of measures published in 2015. Part three is the final part in our marine strategy and complements the existing parts of the strategy:     Marine strategy part one sets out an initial assessment of our seas and characteristics, targets and indicators of GES    Marine strategy part two sets out monitoring programmes for measuring progress towards GES   "
